message:
✨ Add fish quantity carry-over and product images to wizard (#25)

Fish quantities from the tank calculator URL params (e.g. ?fish=Guppy:6)
now carry over into the build wizard with +/- controls for adjustment.
Fish type cards show product thumbnail images and drill-down cards
display featured images alongside titles and prices.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
